violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food items was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed open case of bananas and a full case of waffle syrup on the floor at time of inspection.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No test strips for the quat santitizer.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Employee stated that they use the laundry sink to wash hands instead of having a hand sink in the kitchen area. New hand sink installed in kitchen area by 3-compartment sink.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
